title: Fire Aspect Tridents
description: Allowing tridents, ranged and melee to have fire aspect.
body:
## Fire Aspect Tridents
This mod allows for tridents to be enchanted with fire aspect.

![anvil being used to add fire aspect to a trident](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0cbbce39df5155ae3627dceea94052f4fe69bf5.png)

Fire aspect will take affect on both ranged and melee attacks. The fire lasts for the same amount of time it would last for on a sword.
